solutions.compoundsDesc: Manage resident passes, contractor permits, and delivery windows across multiple gates — all from one dashboard.
solutions.schoolsDesc: Issue parent pickup QR codes, restrict contractor access after hours, and get a full audit of who entered your campus today.
solutions.eventsDesc: Scan 2,000 tickets per hour offline without WiFi. Prevent reprints with HMAC-signed, single-use QR codes.
solutions.clubsDesc: Differentiate member tiers, limit guest quota per member, and give receptionists a lightweight tablet app.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Prices in EGP & AED. No per-gate fees. No hidden charges. Cancel any time.

home.heroTitle: Managing gate security has never been easier.
home.heroSubTitle: End-to-end visitor access and gate security in a single solution. Empower your security team with the platform designed to keep unauthorized guests out.
home.problemSubTitle: Whether you manage a compound of 500 villas or a beach club with 3,000 members, GateFlow adapts to your workflow.
